metadata.title: Search on Internet
metadata.description: Add context menu items to search the internet within Obsidian.

regex.source:
.setDesc('If set to true, this will open your searches in an iframe within Obsidian. ' +
            'Otherwise, it will open in your default browser.')
regex.target:
.setDesc('如果设置为true，这将在Obsidian中的iframe中打开您的搜索。 ' +
            '否则，它将在默认浏览器中打开。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Name of the search. Click the cross to delete the search.')

.setDesc('If set to true, this will encode raw text to be used in URLs. ' +
                'Otherwise, it will not encode your query.')
regex.target:
.setDesc('如果设置为true，这将对URL中使用的原始文本进行编码。 ' +
                '否则，它将不会对您的查询进行编码。')

regex.source:
.setDesc('URL to open when executing the search. ' +
                'Use {{query}} to refer to the query, which is either the selected text, or the title of a note.')
regex.target:
.setDesc('执行搜索时打开的URL。 ' +
                '使用｛｛query｝｝引用查询，该查询可以是所选文本，也可以是注释的标题。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Only add search to notes with these comma-separated tags. Leave empty to use all tags.')
regex.target: .setDesc('仅对带有逗号分隔标签的笔记添加搜索。留空以使用所有标签。')
